---
title: "Mini-Blog"
listing:
  contents: .             # If your posts are inside a "posts" folder, or use "." for current folder
  type: default               # Can be: default, grid, or table
  sort: "date desc"           # Shows newest posts first
  categories: true            # Enables a sidebar tag filter
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

Welcome to my blog subsection! Below you will find all my recent entries.
